title: EU moves to ban AI that creates nonconsensual sexual images
description: Artificial intelligence tools that can be used to create nonconsensual sexual images may be banned in the European Union, following outcry after users used Elon Musk's Grok service to generate thousands of undressed pictures of women and children.
content:

title: Powered Soho Suite for Hospitality Industry
description: RateGain Travel Technologies has launched its AI-based Soho Suite, an integrated platform for the hospitality industry that combines digital asset management, social media publishing, and community inbox functionality. The suite is designed to help hotels and hospitality businesses convert social media engagement into actual booking demand through artificial intelligence-powered tools and streamlined digital marketing workflows.

title: Mystery AI model revealed to be Xiaomi’s following suspicions it was DeepSeek V4
description: A powerful artificial intelligence model that appeared anonymously on a developer platform last week was revealed on Wednesday to be from Chinese smartphone and EV giant Xiaomi, after it fueled speculation that startup DeepSeek was quietly testing its next-generation system ahead of a launch.
